hero.title: About Us
hero.description: TryUtils is committed to providing simple and practical online tools for users

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Make complex file processing simple and easy to use, complete various format conversion and processing tasks directly in the browser without installing complex software.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: TryUtils was born from the need for simple and efficient tools. In our daily work, we often encounter various file format conversion needs, but existing solutions either require installing complex software or have privacy and security issues.
story.paragraph2: Therefore, we decided to create a completely browser-based tool collection that allows users to safely and quickly process various file formats while protecting user privacy and data security.

vision.title: Future Vision
vision.description: We will continue to expand our tool collection to cover more file formats and processing needs, always adhering to the principles of simplicity, ease of use, and privacy security, becoming the most trusted online tool platform for users.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any suggestions or cooperation intentions, please feel free to contact us via email.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: We value your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: TryUtils (hereinafter referred to as "we") is committed to protecting user privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.point1: Usage data: including pages you visit, features you use, access times, etc.
collection.point2: Device information: browser type, operating system, IP address, and other technical information
collection.point3: File processing: Files you upload are processed only locally in your browser and are not uploaded to our servers

usage.title: Use of Information
usage.point2: Analyze website usage to optimize user experience
usage.point3: Ensure website security and prevent abuse

cookies.title: Use of Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, including remembering your preferences and analyzing website usage. You can control cookie usage through your browser settings.

ads.title: Third-Party Advertising
ads.description: We may display third-party advertisements. These advertising providers may use cookies to display relevant ads. We do not control the privacy practices of these third parties.

security.title: Data Security
security.description: We employ appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.point1: Access: You have the right to know what information we collect about you
rights.point2: Correction: You can request correction of inaccurate personal information
rights.point3: Deletion: In certain circumstances, you can request deletion of your personal information

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.description: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated through website notifications or other appropriate means.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy
